settings.title: Settings
settings.description: Manage note columns and other app configuration in one place.

columns.title: Columns
columns.description: Add, edit, reorder, hide, and remove the note fields your cards use.

general.title: General
general.placeholder: General card settings will be added in T43.

exportImport.title: Export / Import
exportImport.description: Move your notes data in and out as JSON.
exportImport.placeholder: Export and import controls will be added in T44.

dangerZone.title: Danger Zone
dangerZone.description: Destructive actions stay guarded behind confirmation.
dangerZone.placeholder: Delete-all-notes controls will be added in T45.

fields.title: Column title
fields.name: Column name
fields.hidden: Hide this column from note cards and forms

status.error: Columns could not be loaded right now.
status.empty: No columns are configured yet. Add your first custom field to get started.

confirmDelete.title: Delete column
confirmDelete.description: Delete "{{title}}" from the column list? Existing note values will stay stored for now.

errors.submit: The column could not be saved. Try again.
errors.updateHidden: The column visibility could not be updated. Try again.
errors.delete: The column could not be deleted. Try again.
errors.reorder: The column order could not be saved. Try again.

hints.reorder: Drag the handle to reorder columns. Default columns can stay in the order you prefer, but they cannot be deleted.
hints.defaultIdentity: Default columns keep their original name and type.
